title: Curtain Up
writer: Michael Pertwee, Jack Davies, Philip King
actors: Robert Morley, Margaret Rutherford, Kay Kendall
plot: In a small town in the 1950s, a repertory company meets on Monday morning to start rehearsing the following week's play. This is a ghastly thing written by the aunt of one of the theatre's directors. The producer doesn't try to hi...
